title: allium splendens subsp. splendens
intro: Allium splendens subsp. splendens, also known as the 'ornamental onion', is a perennial plant species belonging to the Allium genus, characterized by its ornamental value due to its bright purple flowers and narrow foliage. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Allium splendens subsp. splendens include reducing symptoms of colds and flu, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures, infusions, and salves, to promote overall well-being and address various health issues.
